{{Quote|We, the Republic, stand at a crossroads, and the lessons of the past risk being forgotten to appease anxious constituents.|Eeshrin Ot'Hyne|<ref name="HNN 47">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|47|news/13314_2.html|Point/Counterpoint: Military Creation Act}}</ref>}}
'''Eeshrin Ot'Hyne''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Caamasi/Legends|Caamasi]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who represented [[Caamas/Legends|Caamas]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|I had hoped we had seen the last of open, unprovoked hostility at Antar 4.|Eeshrin Ot'Hyne|<ref name="HNN 50">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|50|regional/1344_2.html|Shots Fired in Andoan Space}}</ref>}}
After the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] Ot'Hyne spoke against the establishment of a [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] and the [[Military Creation Act/Legends|Military Creation Act]]. He took the opposite side, while [[Terrinald Screed/Legends|Terrinald Screed]] represented the other side. He recalled that the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]], which lasted for a thousand [[Standard year/Legends|years]] in peace with no war, must be recognized in the danger or everything that the Republic stood for would be destroyed. He also included an opinion piece titled "We Are Inviting This War" wrote on the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]]. He found that public the money would be better invested in the [[Diplomatic Corps]] of the [[Refugee Relief Movement/Legends|Refugee Relief Movement]].

After the incident, Senator Ot'Hyne traveled to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Antar 4/Legends|Antar 4]] where he emphasized himself in another broadcast of the network's expectations.

{{Char-stub}}
